pkgmetadata.longdescription: Lucu is an HTTP daemonic library. It can be embedded in any Haskell program and runs in an independent thread. Lucu is not a replacement for Apache. It is intended to be used to create an efficient web-based application without messing around FastCGI. It is also intended to be run behind a reverse-proxy so it doesn't have some facilities like logging, client filtering and so on.
